app_summary: RedReader is an application that allows users to browse and interact with Reddit content. It provides a range of features including subreddit subscriptions, account management, and customization options such as font scaling and theme selection.

core_workflows.description: User logs in or continues browsing anonymously, then navigates through the subreddit listings and settings.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow is crucial for user engagement and customization, allowing users to access content and tailor their experience.

core_workflows.description: User accesses the settings menu from the subreddit listings.
core_workflows.purpose: Enables users to customize their experience with options such as font scaling, theme selection, and cache management.

core_workflows.description: User navigates through settings options, adjusting font scales for various elements.
core_workflows.purpose: Allows for detailed customization of the application's text and visual elements to enhance readability and accessibility.
